criteria.name: Research fit
criteria.description: Evidence that the applicant's interests, coursework, or methods align with a lab, professor, or project area.
evidence_required: Research interest, course, project, or lab relevance
positive_signals: Fit is specific to a topic or method

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Literature review
criteria.description: Evidence of finding, reading, summarizing, or synthesizing academic sources.
evidence_required: Literature review, annotated bibliography, or paper summary

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Data collection and organization
criteria.description: Evidence of collecting, labeling, organizing, cleaning, or managing research data.
positive_signals: Data handling task and quality control are clear

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Statistical or computational analysis
criteria.description: Evidence of using statistical, computational, or analytical methods for research questions.
positive_signals: Method is tied to a research question

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Experimental or modeling experience
criteria.description: Evidence of assisting with experiments, simulations, modeling, or study design.

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Research tools
criteria.description: Evidence of using tools relevant to the research domain.
positive_signals: Tool use is connected to research work

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Academic writing
criteria.description: Evidence of writing research summaries, reports, papers, abstracts, or documentation.

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Reproducibility
criteria.description: Evidence of organizing files, code, notes, protocols, or methods so work can be reviewed or repeated.
evidence_required: Reproducible code, protocol, notes, or repository

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Publication or presentation only when user-provided
criteria.description: Publication, poster, presentation, or authorship claims must be directly user-provided and accurately scoped.
evidence_required: User-provided publication, poster, presentation, or authorship evidence
positive_signals: Status and contribution are accurately described

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

notes: Static v0 profile with manually curated public role-fit indicators. It does not represent private employer rules.
